name: Orange Marmalade
recipeIngredient: 4 medium sized (or 3 large) unpeeled oranges, halved and sliced thin
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure the oranges and lemons together.
2. Add 5 times as much cold water.
3. Place in a saucepan and bring to boiling point.
4. Boil for one hour until the quantity is reduced by half.
5. Measure into four 4-cup units.
6. If the oranges are overly sweet, add 1 tablespoon lemon juice for every cup of fruit.
7. Add 3/4 cup sugar per cup of fruit and stir until dissolved.
8. Boil each unit rapidly for not more than 10 minutes, stirring frequently.
9. If a longer boiling time is needed, boil the next batch for an extended period before adding the sugar.
10. Pour into sterilized glass jars and cover with paraffin when cold.
